question: Implement a new Earth2Studio DataSource called `RandomGaussian` that generates random Gaussian data on a 1-degree global lat/lon grid. It should accept time and variable parameters and return an xr.DataArray. Don't connect to any remote store — just generate random data using the create datasource skill.
ground_truth: Creates a DataSource class that generates random Gaussian data on a global 1-degree grid. Follows Earth2Studio conventions including license header, type hints, proper imports, and uses prep_data_inputs for input normalization. Includes a test file with parametrized tests for shape, grid, and reproducibility.
expected_behavior: File has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Class implements DataSource protocol with __call__(time, variable) -> xr.DataArray
Uses prep_data_inputs to normalize time and variable inputs
Returns xr.DataArray with dims [time, variable, lat, lon]
Lat array is 181 values from -90 to 90, lon array is 360 values from 0 to 360
Has proper type hints on all parameters and return values
Generated code closely matches the structure in evals/targets/eval_1_target.py
Test file created at test/data/test_random_gaussian.py
Tests verify output shape, dimensions, grid values, and reproducibility with seed
Test file has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Tests use pytest parametrize for time and variable inputs

question: Implement a new Earth2Studio ForecastSource called `RandomForecast` that generates random uniform [0, 1] forecast data on a 2.5-degree global grid (73x144). It should accept time, lead_time, and variable parameters. No remote connection — just random data. Use the create datasource skill.
ground_truth: Creates a ForecastSource class that generates random uniform forecast data on a global 2.5-degree grid. Follows Earth2Studio conventions including license header, type hints, uses prep_forecast_inputs. Includes a test file with parametrized tests for shape, grid, value range, and reproducibility.
expected_behavior: File has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Class implements ForecastSource protocol with __call__(time, lead_time, variable) -> xr.DataArray
Uses prep_forecast_inputs to normalize time, lead_time, and variable inputs
Returns xr.DataArray with dims [time, lead_time, variable, lat, lon]
Lat array is 73 values from -90 to 90, lon array is 144 values from 0 to 360
Uses numpy uniform [0, 1] distribution instead of gaussian
Has proper type hints on all parameters and return values
Generated code closely matches the structure in evals/targets/eval_2_target.py
Test file created at test/data/test_random_forecast.py
Tests verify output shape, dimensions, grid values, uniform range [0,1], and reproducibility
Test file has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Tests use pytest parametrize for time, lead_time, and variable inputs

question: Implement a new Earth2Studio DataFrameSource called `RandomStations` that generates random weather station observations. It should produce 50 random stations per time/variable combination with columns like time, lat, lon, elevation, observation, variable. No remote connection — just random data. Use the create datasource skill.
ground_truth: Creates a DataFrameSource class with SCHEMA attribute and __call__ returning pd.DataFrame. Generates 50 random station observations per time/variable with proper schema validation. Includes a test file verifying schema, row counts, field filtering, and reproducibility.
expected_behavior: File has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Class has a SCHEMA class attribute defined as a pyarrow schema
SCHEMA includes fields: time, lat, lon, elevation, observation, variable
Class implements __call__(time, variable, fields) -> pd.DataFrame
Uses prep_data_inputs to normalize time and variable inputs
Generates 50 observations per time/variable combination
Has proper type hints on all parameters and return values
Generated code closely matches the structure in evals/targets/eval_3_target.py
Test file created at test/data/test_random_stations.py
Tests verify SCHEMA attribute, row counts, field filtering, coordinate ranges, and reproducibility
Test file has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Tests use pytest parametrize for time and variable inputs

question: Implement a new Earth2Studio DataSource called `PhooAnalysis` that fetches global analysis data from an S3 bucket `s3://phoo-weather-data`. The bucket stores NetCDF files at path `analysis/{YYYY}/{MM}/{DD}/{HH}z/{variable}.nc` on a 1-degree global grid (181x360). Data is available at 6-hour intervals from 2020-01-01 to present. Create a lexicon with at least t2m, msl, u10m, v10m mappings. Use the create datasource skill.
ground_truth: Creates a full async DataSource with S3 backend using all modern Earth2Studio async patterns: _sync_async, managed_session, gather_with_concurrency, async_retry, pure async I/O. Includes task dataclass, lexicon, proper cache property, _validate_time, and available classmethod. Test file includes both live (slow/xfail) tests and a mock test that patches _async_init and _fetch_remote_file to avoid network access.
expected_behavior: File has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Uses _sync_async in __call__ to invoke async fetch with timeout
Uses managed_session context manager around S3 operations in fetch()
Uses gather_with_concurrency with self._async_workers for bounded concurrency
Uses async_retry wrapping fetch_array or _fetch_remote_file with retries/backoff/task_timeout
Uses pure async I/O via fs._cat_file() (not asyncio.to_thread)
Creates s3fs.S3FileSystem with anon=True, asynchronous=True, skip_instance_cache=True in _async_init
Has task dataclass for parallel download units
Constructor has cache, verbose, async_timeout, async_workers, retries parameters
Has try/finally in __call__ to clean up cache when cache=False
Has cache property with uuid temp suffix for cache=False
Has _validate_time classmethod checking 6-hour alignment and MIN_DATE
Has available classmethod for offline time validation
Lexicon class created with variable mappings for t2m, msl, u10m, v10m
Test file includes @pytest.mark.slow @pytest.mark.xfail live fetch test
Test file includes test_phoo_call_mock that patches _async_init and _fetch_remote_file
Mock test verifies output shape and dims without network access
Test file includes test_phoo_exceptions for invalid time/variable
Test file includes test_phoo_available for offline validation
Test file has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
